name: Fruited Rice Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container.
3. To prepare Fruited rice, measure out 1 cup of the rice mix and place it in a heavy 2-quart saucepan.
4. Add 2 cups of water and 2 tablespoons butter or margarine to the saucepan.
5. Cover tightly and bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
6. Reduce the heat to medium-low and let simmer without lifting the lid for 30 minutes, or until the water is absorbed.
7. Yield: about 3 1/2 cups of cooked rice.
